ships.name: USS Nimitz
ships.status: May 7, USS Nimitz anchored at Anchorage #1 in Guanabara Bay, approx. 1 n.m. west of Niteroi, Brazil, for a five-day liberty port visit to Rio de Janeiro.

ships.name: USS Dwight D. Eisenhower
ships.status: April 24, 2026 USS Dwight D. Eisenhower moored at Pier 11N on Naval Station Norfolk after a four-day underway for sea trials, following a 16-month availability; Underway for flight deck certification and CQ, with the Carrier Air Wing (CVW) 3, on May 5.

ships.name: USS Carl Vinson
ships.status: September 16, The Carl Vinson moored at Juliet Pier on Naval Air Station North Island after a three-day underway for ammo offload.

ships.name: USS Theodore Roosevelt
ships.status: February 9, USS Theodore Roosevelt moored at Berth Lima on Naval Air Station North Island; Underway for FRS/CQ from March 28- April 5; Underway for Composite Training Unit Exercise (COMPTUEX) on April 15.

ships.name: USS Abraham Lincoln
ships.status: March 10,  USS Abraham Lincoln conducted a replenishment-at-sea with the USNS Henry J. Kaiser, while underway in the North Arabian Sea;  Conducted a replenishment-at-sea again on March 18 and 28th;  Conducted a replenishment-at-sea with the USNS Carl Brashear on April 18 and 19th.

ships.name: USS George Washington
ships.status: May 10, USS George Washington departed Fleet Activities Yokosuka  for sea trials following a four-month Selected Restricted Availability (SRA).

ships.name: USS John C. Stennis
ships.status: April 8, 2024 USS John C. Stennis undocked and moored at Outfitting Berth #1 on Newport News Shipyard.

ships.name: USS Harry S. Truman
ships.status: September 26, The Harry S. Truman moored at Pier 14S on Naval Station Norfolk; Moved to Pier 14N on Sept. 28; Brief underway  on Oct. 8; Moved to Pier 12N on Jan. 21.

ships.name: USS Ronald Reagan
ships.status: November 12,  USS Ronald Reagan moored at Bravo Pier on Naval Base Kitsap-Bremerton; Underway for FRS-CQ, in the SOCAL Op. Area, from Dec. 2-13.

ships.name: USS George H.W. Bush
ships.status: April 27, USS George H.W. Bush CSG-10 recently arrived on station in the North Arabian Sea in support of Operation Epic Fury.

ships.name: USS Gerald R. Ford
ships.status: April 13, The Gerald R. Ford conducted a replenishment-at-sea with the USNS Kanawha, while underway approx. 170 n.m. southwest of Cyprus; Transited the Suez Canal southbound on April 16; Conducted operations in the northern Red Sea from April 17-30; Transited the Suez Canal northbound on May 1; Transited the Strait of Sicily westbound, just after midnight, on May 4; Transited the Strait of Gibraltar on May 6.

ships.name: USS Wasp
ships.status: April 14, USS Wasp moored at Berth 6, Pier 11 on Naval Station Norfolk after a 10-day underway for deck landing qualifications, in the Virginia Capes Op. Area; Underway again on April 28; Moored at Berth 6, Pier 6 on May 9; Moved "dead-stick" to Pier 1 in BAE Systems shipyard on May 19.

ships.name: USS Essex
ships.status: No recent status found.

ships.name: USS Kearsarge
ships.status: April 27, The Kearsarge moored at Berth 4, Pier 14 on Naval Station Norfolk; Underway again on May 4.

ships.name: USS Boxer
ships.status: April 19, USS Boxer moored at Berth 2/3, Tango Wharf in Apra Harbor, Guam, for a three-day port call; Transited the Surigao Strait southbound on April 26; Transited the Balabac Strait westbound on April 28; Transited the Strait of Singapore on April 30; Transited the Malacca Strait northbound from April 30- May 1.

ships.name: USS Bataan
ships.status: July ?, 2025 USS Bataan undocked and moored at  Berth 2E on NASSCO shipyard.

ships.name: USS Iwo Jima
ships.status: , USS Iwo Jima moored at Berth 2, Pier 14 on Naval Station Norfolk following a nearly 10-month deployment in the U.S. 2nd and 4th Fleet AoR.

ships.name: USS Makin Island
ships.status: April 17, The Makin Island anchored approx. 2 n.m. off the coast of Camp Pendleton Boat Basin for a brief stop; Moored at Naval Weapons Station Seal Beach for ammo onload from April 20-29; Moored at Berth 5, Pier 8 on April 30; Underway for Surface Warfare Advanced Tactical Training (SWATT) exercise on May 8.

ships.name: USS America
ships.status: , USS America moored at Berth 5, Pier 13 in its new homeport of Naval Base San Diego after forward-deployed to Japan for nearly six years.

ships.name: USS Tripoli
ships.status: March 29, USS Tripoli, along with the USS New Orleans (LPD 18), recently arrived in the North Arabian Sea in support of Operation Epic Fury; Conducted a replenishment-at-sea with the USNS Carl Brashear (T-AKE 7) on April 13.
